title: Ports with default assignments cannot use implicit net type
body:
Despite being supported by the standard, ports with default assignments must have an explicit net type. For example, the following code

```verilog
module test (
	input x, y = 1,
	output z
);
	
	assign z = x ^ y;

endmodule
```

results in the error

```
test.v:2: syntax error
test.v:1: Errors in port declarations.
```

[Possibly related](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/70476815/iverilog-not-compiling-multiple-port-declarations-with-multiple-bits-written-in)?
